source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
source_jobs.description:
Turn cold enterprise prospects into qualified opportunities.

As Ribbon’s BDR, you’ll help build our top-of-funnel by identifying great accounts, breaking into high-value organizations, and booking demos that fuel our GTM engine.

You do not need traditional BDR experience. We are looking for someone smart, curious, fearless, and full of raw energy. We can train you on sales. What we cannot train is hunger, confidence, work ethic, and the willingness to do the hard things most people avoid.

We have just added a new Head of Sales and are entering a major growth phase. If you want to join an early-stage AI company right as the GTM engine is about to take off, this is the launchpad.




ABOUT RIBBON

Ribbon is building the future of hiring: faster, smarter, and built for scale. Recognized by Fast Company as one of the Most Innovative Companies of 2026 and featured by The New York Times, BBC, Inc., and Bloomberg, we’re helping employers find the right people 10× faster. Our always-on voice AI interviewer screens candidates in minutes, identifies top talent automatically, and frees recruiters to spend time where it matters most. We work with some of the largest Fortune 500s customers in automotive, self-storage, logistics, and high-volume hiring, Ribbon is helping teams dramatically reduce time-to-hire, raise candidate quality, and scale without adding headcount.




HOW YOU’LL MAKE AN IMPACT

 - Own outbound prospecting into enterprise and strategic accounts across key verticals, focused on Talent leaders, HR executives, recruiting operations leaders, and business stakeholders responsible for high-volume hiring.

 - Build and run multi-touch outbound sequences across phone, SMS, email, LinkedIn, Clay, Aircall, and Attio to maximize engagement.

 - Research accounts deeply to understand hiring patterns, business priorities, org structure, and likely pain points.

 - Identify and engage the right stakeholders, including decision-makers, champions, and cross-functional influencers.

 - Book qualified meetings and demos for Account Executives by creating urgency and clearly articulating Ribbon’s value.

 - Partner closely with AEs and our Head of Sales to break into priority accounts, coordinate account strategy, and improve conversion within named account lists.

 - Capture clear qualification notes around hiring volume, current process, pain points, ATS environment, urgency, and stakeholder map.

 - Help refine our outbound motion by testing messaging, learning from objections, and sharing patterns from the market.

 - Consistently hit weekly and monthly KPIs tied to outbound activity, meetings booked, show rates, and pipeline creation.

 - Become an expert in Ribbon’s product, customer use cases, ROI story, and enterprise buying signals.
   


WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO

 - Does not need BDR experience, but has the raw energy, confidence, and fearlessness to learn quickly.

 - Is comfortable with rejection and willing to keep going when a prospect ignores you, says no, or hangs up.

 - Communicates with purpose - concise, clear, and persuasive.

 - Has strong phone presence, or the willingness to develop it quickly: high energy, confident, and quick on your feet.

 - Learns fast and iterates even faster. You embrace coaching, experiment aggressively, and are not afraid to scrap what does not work.

 - Operates with high ownership: proactive, organized, and comfortable managing high-volume outreach independently.

 - Is resilient, optimistic, and excited by the pace of an early-stage startup.

 - Wants to be part of a company at an inflection point, with a new sales leader in place and a massive opportunity ahead.




WHY RIBBON

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity. We want you thinking like an owner because you are one.

 - Direct customer impact. You’ll shape how companies adopt AI in one of the most important parts of their business: hiring.

 - Cutting-edge tech. Work with the latest AI tooling, not yesterday’s stack.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Own the enterprise sales journey from first conversation through close. As Ribbon’s Enterprise Account Executive, you’ll work directly with Talent, HR, Operations, and business leaders to help them understand how AI can transform the way they hire.

You’ll be responsible for building pipeline, running consultative sales cycles, deeply understanding customer hiring challenges, and closing high-impact enterprise opportunities. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in fast-moving environments, can sell strategically, and wants to help define the category for AI-powered recruiting.




ABOUT RIBBON

Ribbon is building the future of hiring: faster, smarter, and built for scale. Recognized by Fast Company as one of the Most Innovative Companies of 2026 and featured by The New York Times, BBC, Inc., and Bloomberg, we’re helping employers find the right people 10× faster. Our always-on voice AI interviewer screens candidates in minutes, identifies top talent automatically, and frees recruiters to spend time where it matters most. We work with some of the largest Fortune 500s customers in automotive, self-storage, logistics, and high-volume hiring, Ribbon is helping teams dramatically reduce time-to-hire, raise candidate quality, and scale without adding headcount.




HOW YOU’LL MAKE AN IMPACT

 - Own the full enterprise sales cycle, from prospecting and discovery through evaluation, negotiation, and close.

 - Build strong relationships with Talent, HR, Operations, and executive stakeholders to understand their hiring priorities, workflows, and business goals.

 - Run compelling discovery calls, product demos, pilot discussions, business cases, and executive-level presentations.

 - Partner closely with Customer Success, Product, Engineering, and Leadership to structure pilots, proposals, pricing, and implementation plans that drive customer success.

 - Develop strategic account plans, manage complex deal cycles, and consistently drive pipeline creation, deal progression, and revenue growth.




WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO

 - Has 4+ years of B2B SaaS sales experience, ideally selling into enterprise, mid-market, HR, Talent Acquisition, recruiting, staffing, or workforce-related buyers.

 - Has experience owning full-cycle sales, including outbound prospecting, discovery, demos, business case development, negotiation, and closing.

 - Can sell consultatively to multiple stakeholders and uncover business pain around hiring speed, recruiter capacity, candidate quality, operational efficiency, and cost.

 - Is comfortable running complex sales cycles with senior leaders, including Heads of Talent, CHROs, HR leaders, Operations leaders, and executives.

 - Has strong commercial judgment and can manage forecasting, pipeline hygiene, next steps, mutual action plans, and deal strategy with discipline.

 - Communicates clearly and confidently, both in writing and live conversations, and can make complex ideas feel simple and compelling.

 - Is proactive, competitive, curious, and excited to help build the sales motion at a fast-growing AI startup.




WHY RIBBON

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity. We want you thinking like an owner because you are one.

 - Direct customer impact. You’ll shape how companies adopt AI in one of the most important parts of their business: hiring.

 - Cutting-edge tech. Work with the latest AI tooling, not yesterday’s stack.

 - High-growth environment. Join at the inflection point of a fast-scaling, VC-backed company.

 - Health & wellness stipend. Your mind and body are part of the product.

 - Annual international offsite. Each year, we take our team on an exciting journey to a different international destination. It’s more than just travel, it’s an investment in alignment and collaboration.

 - Team lunches & meetups in Toronto. A flexible hybrid work environment.




READY TO STANDOUT? HOW TO APPLY:

source_jobs.title: Founding Growth & Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
Build the marketing engine behind the future of hiring.

Ribbon is looking for a Founding Growth & Marketing Lead to build the voice, pipeline, and brand behind one of the fastest-growing categories in recruiting: AI-powered interviewing.

Your mission is simple: build the marketing engine that creates awareness, generates pipeline, and helps Ribbon become the category leader in AI interviewing.

This is a rare opportunity to build the function from the ground up. You will shape how the market understands AI in hiring, turn customer momentum into demand, partner directly with Sales and the founders, and have a direct impact on company growth.



ABOUT RIBBON

Ribbon is building the future of hiring: faster, smarter, and built for scale. Recognized by Fast Company as one of the Most Innovative Companies of 2026 and featured by The New York Times, BBC, Inc., and Bloomberg, we’re helping employers find the right people 10× faster. Our always-on voice AI interviewer screens candidates in minutes, identifies top talent automatically, and frees recruiters to spend time where it matters most. We work with some of the largest Fortune 500s customers in automotive, self-storage, logistics, and high-volume hiring, Ribbon is helping teams dramatically reduce time-to-hire, raise candidate quality, and scale without adding headcount.



HOW YOU’LL MAKE AN IMPACT

 - Build Ribbon’s marketing engine from the ground up across demand generation, product marketing, content, events, customer marketing, and sales enablement.

 - Generate qualified pipeline by creating campaigns, events, webinars, website conversion, and nurture programs that turn awareness into revenue.

 - Define and amplify Ribbon’s market voice through standout content, thought leadership, founder POVs, and category-defining messaging around AI interviewing and the future of hiring.

 - Turn customer wins, product launches, and market insights into revenue-driving stories across case studies, LinkedIn, email, website, sales materials, and outbound campaigns.

 - Partner closely with Sales, CS, Product, and the founders to sharpen messaging, support priority accounts, surface customer proof points, and continuously improve performance across pipeline, conversion, engagement, and event ROI.




WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO

 - Has 5–8+ years of B2B SaaS marketing experience in a high-growth startup with proven success across pipeline generation, content, product marketing, campaigns, and GTM strategy.

 - Writes exceptionally well and can turn complex ideas into clear, sharp, compelling messaging that resonates with customers and supports sales.

 - Understands revenue and knows how to build marketing programs that generate pipeline, improve conversion, and move deals forward.

 - Is a hands-on builder who can execute across content, demand generation, events, email, website, customer marketing, and sales enablement without needing a big team or perfect process.

 - Thinks like a founder: moves fast, takes ownership, spots opportunities, learns quickly, and thrives in an early-stage startup environment.

 - Is creative, practical, and data-driven who is able to come up with bold ideas, ship quickly, measure what works, and keep improving.




WHY RIBBON

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity. We want you thinking like an owner because you are one.

 - Direct customer impact. You’ll shape how companies adopt AI in one of the most important parts of their business: hiring.

 - Cutting-edge tech. Work with the latest AI tooling, not yesterday’s stack.

 - High-growth environment. Join at the inflection point of a fast-scaling, VC-backed company.

 - Health & wellness stipend. Your mind and body are part of the product.

 - Annual international offsite. Each year, we take our team on an exciting journey to a different international destination. It’s more than just travel, it’s an investment in alignment and collaboration.

 - Team lunches & meetups in Toronto. A flexible hybrid
